personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: AI Engineer • LLM Orchestration, RAG & Scalable AI Platforms
personalInfo.professionalObjective: AI Engineer specializing in LLM orchestration, RAG architectures, and production-grade AI platform engineering. Experienced in building fault-tolerant AI systems with real-time inference, voice AI, and secure data pipelines. Recognized for bridging the gap between AI research and production — delivering sub-200ms inference latency, 99.9% uptime on AI services, and RGPD-compliant data handling at scale.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France | VPF Visa – Free access to the French job market

experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Orchestrated the migration of a legacy PHP monolith to a modern TypeScript stack (Node.js, Prisma, Redis), delivering a scalable platform capable of 1,200 RPS with 99.95% availability via AWS auto-scaling — establishing the engineering foundation for subsequent AI feature integration.
Designed and deployed resilient backend services with event-driven architecture, achieving a 30% reduction in API response times through query optimization and distributed caching for 200k+ MAU.

Led the adoption of Clean Architecture and TypeScript across a team of 3, implemented comprehensive E2E test coverage (Playwright, Vitest) at 80% of critical paths, reducing regressions by 35% and accelerating code reviews by 40%.

experience.title: AI Consultant & Engineer
responsibilities: Architected and deployed AI platforms as a Solo Engineer or embedded with client teams — delivering production-grade LLM services with strict security and latency guarantees.

Lexity (AI EdTech) : Designed and deployed a secure AI platform with RAG-based intelligent feedback, multi-provider LLM executor with automatic failover, and data sanitization pipelines for RGPD compliance — maintaining sub-200ms TTFT and 99.9% uptime.

Interly (AI Coaching) : Built a real-time AI voice coaching platform supporting 500+ concurrent audio streams with <300ms latency, integrating Web Audio API and Google Speech-to-Text for low-latency voice interaction.
ZIRO.FIT (SaaS Fitness Platform) : Architected a full-stack platform connecting sports coaches with their clients, demonstrating end-to-end system design capability beyond AI.

experience.title: Software Developer (Part-time)
responsibilities: Designed and deployed scalable micro-services (Node.js/PostgreSQL) for Enterprise applications (processing 50k+ requests/day), applying Clean Architecture principles with zero-downtime production deployments.
Standardized code review processes with structured checklists, reducing review turnaround by 25% and limiting post-merge defects to under 2 per sprint.

education.degree: Engineering Degree in Programmable Mobile Systems (3 years completed)

education.description: Technical Focus: System programming (C, C++, Assembly), microprocessor architecture, and fundamental algorithms.
